description: The sprint-3 contract scope sentence (frontmatter line 4) propagates the same finding-mislabeling seen in FIND-501..FIND-503: 'Covers Rust stub removal (FIND-401/402), conditional DOM rendering (FIND-403), write authority moved to AppShell.svelte (FIND-404), TS-side pipeline orchestration (FIND-405)...'. Sprint-2 review labelled the findings as: FIND-401 = Rust stub (single finding, not joint with 402); FIND-402 = settings persistence; FIND-405 = cross-platform path. Bundling FIND-401/402 under 'Rust stub removal' erases the distinct settings-persistence diagnosis, and routing 'TS-side pipeline orchestration' to FIND-405 contradicts the sprint-2 FIND-405 description (cross-platform path). Because the scope sentence is the contract's executive summary that downstream gates and humans read first, this systemic mislabeling undermines the contract's auditability.
